description: Inventory of canonical proof lanes, AGENTS.md validation commands, and focused validation lanes with explicit cargo graph boundary expectations.

lanes.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_default_tokio_tree cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync -i tokio

lanes.intended_guarantee: Focused cfg(test) compile attempt for the channel MPSC/select E2E module.

lanes.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_channel_mpsc_select_e2e CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --lib --features channel-mpsc-select-e2e real_channel_mpsc_combinator_select_integration_e2e_tests -- --nocapture
lanes.intended_guarantee: Filtered execution of the channel MPSC/select E2E module.

lanes.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_mpsc_recv_many_baton CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --lib channel::mpsc::tests::recv_many_sender_wake_cascades_after_head_reserve_polls -- --exact --nocapture
lanes.intended_guarantee: Exact lib-test execution for recv_many sender wake-cascade regression.

known_regressions_or_blockers.summary: Focused cfg(test) channel proof attempts repeatedly reached the asupersync-conformance compile tail and then went RCH progress-stale with fresh hook heartbeats.
evidence: RCH builds 29880940465487998 and 29880940465487999 cancelled cleanly after stale progress
known_regressions_or_blockers.vf2_follow_up: Decide whether conformance is intentional for these focused lanes. If not, quarantine the graph so focused channel checks do not compile unrelated conformance surfaces.

known_regressions_or_blockers.summary: Forcing RUSTFLAGS='--cfg test' globally is invalid because third-party crates activate test-only imports without their dev-dependencies.
evidence: RCH build 29880940465488002 failed in const-oid and rustc_version test-only imports
known_regressions_or_blockers.vf2_follow_up: Do not use global --cfg test as a focused compile workaround. Split targets or feature gates instead.
